Today, @POTUS Trump and I honored the @USCG Academy 2026 graduating class of cadets. 

These men and women embody the best of America — a selfless commitment to service and a willingness to stand up and protect their homeland. 

Congratulations to all the graduates. https://t.co/f9WHu3bkbs

author.description: Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.

tweets.text:
Today, I had the privilege of joining @POTUS Trump at the @USCGAcademy graduation as we paid tribute to the 2026 class of cadets.

These men and women are heroically answering the call to service to defend and protect our homeland and our freedoms. 

May God bless them as they faithfully serve our nation.

author.description: Christian. Husband. Father of 6. 9th Secretary of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security under the leadership of President Donald J. Trump.

tweets.text:
It was a pleasure meeting with @Claudiashein and @USAmbMex today. We discussed key U.S. priorities, including:

➡️Strengthening Mexico’s efforts against narcoterrorists

➡️Sustaining progress in the fight against human smuggling and illegal narcotics

➡️Reinforcing operational commitments to our shared border security and preventing illegal migration

Under @potus we’ve achieved historic U.S. border security. Strong partnerships and continued coordination are key to Make America Safe Again.

tweets.text:
I am closely monitoring the shooting incident near the White House and will update the public as we have more information. 

Tonight’s shooting is a reminder of the dangers our law enforcement officers face every day. 

I am thankful for the bravery and swift action of the @SecretService officers involved. Thankfully, no officers were harmed.

tweets.text:
This is nothing more than a political stunt by New Jersey sanctuary politicians for fundraising clicks. 

There is NO hunger strike at Delaney Hall. There are no subprime conditions.
 
@SenBooker, @SenatorAndyKim, @RepMenendez, @RepNellie, @FrankPallone, @GovSherrillNJ and dozens of New Jersey sanctuary politicians chose to spend their Memorial Day weekend smearing ICE law enforcement. They should be thanking our law enforcement for removing these murderers, pedophiles, rapists, and drug traffickers from their state.

Would these sanctuary politicians like to house these criminals in their homes or have them as neighbors?
 
We need these sanctuary politicians to stop peddling this garbage and cooperate with us to get these criminals out of their state.
